phrases.hebrew: אמצו את המסע, למדו יום יום.

phrases.english: Start with a smile, win the day.
Every day is a new chance.
Believe in good, make it happen.
Be the change, you wish to see.

phrases.hebrew: שתף את השמחה שלך, הפץ אותה.
סמוך על עצמך, אתה יודע הכי טוב.
חגוג הצלחות קטנות, שים לב אליהן.
היה אסיר תודה, הערך את זה.

phrases.english: Listen to your heart, follow it.
Rest well, your body thanks you.

phrases.hebrew: אמץ את הבלתי צפוי, מצא חדש.

phrases.english: See the world, with fresh eyes.

phrases.english: A new day, brings new chances.
Hope is a light, guiding us.
A smile, can change your mood.
phrases.Hebrew: חיוך, יכול לשנות את מצב הרוח.

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you know.
Believe in the good, to come.

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you know.
Believe in the good, to come.
A new day, brings new chances.
Rome wasn't built, in a day.

The waiting, is part of it.
Let it unfold, at its pace.

Find the joy, in small things.

phrases.Hebrew: רקוד כאילו, אף אחד לא רואה.

phrases.english: This is pure bliss, right now.
Let joy bubble up, inside you.
A little bit of joy, goes far.
Breathe in joy, breathe out smiles.
This is what it feels like, to be alive.
Feel the peace, wash over you.
Your heart is full, of light.
Find your happy rhythm, and dance.
phrases.Hebrew: מצא את הקצב השמח שלך, ורקוד.

phrases.english: Your inner joy, is your power.
phrases.Hebrew: השמחה הפנימית שלך, היא הכוח שלך.

phrases.english: Feel the warmth, of this moment.
